name: Aiko Corporation
summary: Aiko Corporation engages in the sale and repair of electric material products and machinery in Japan. The company offers lighting fixtures, electric wires/pipes, wiring materials, switchgears, boards, control equipment, home electronics, electric appliances, IT related peripheral equipment, and other products. It also undertakes fixture installation and incidental works; and designs and constructs electrical products, machinery, and equipment. The company was founded in 1951 and is headquartered in Odawara, Japan.
